page_metadata.biotools__summary: PDBselect is a list of representative protein chains with low mutual sequence identity selected from the protein data bank (PDB) to enable unbiased statistics. PDBfilter-select is an online service to generate user-defined selections.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PDBselect is a list of representative protein chains with low mutual sequence identity selected from the protein data bank (PDB) to enable unbiased statistics. PDBfilter-select is an online service to generate user-defined selections.
